Item Name: VineCo Signature Series Cabernet Sauvignon Merlot Wine Making Ingredient Kit
Bullet Point 1: Cabernet Sauvignon Merlot France Wine Kit - VineCo Signature Series
Bullet Point 2: Flavor Profile - Black current, plum, dark berries, subtle mineral notes and firm structure and tannins
Bullet Point 3: Kit Volume: 14 L, Approximate Yield: 23 L
Bullet Point 4: Ready to Bottle: In 6-8 weeks
Bullet Point 5: Ingredient Kit Only Does Not Contain Alcohol
Product Description: Cabernet Sauvignon Merlot France Wine Kit - VineCo Signature Series - Enjoy the Harmony of Cabernet and Merlot from France. The VineCo Signature Series Cabernet Sauvignon Merlot from France is a harmonious blend that brings together the best of both worlds. This medium-full-bodied red wine showcases flavors of dark fruits, plum, and hints of spice, creating a satisfying and rich experience. With an alcohol content of 13% by volume, this dry red is perfect for any occasion. Crafted with a medium oak influence, this blend develops added complexity with notes of vanilla and toasty spice. It pairs wonderfully with grilled meats, pasta dishes, and hearty stews, making it a versatile addition to your wine collection. Ingredient Kit Only Does Not Contain Alcohol.
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
product_name: Signature Series Cabernet Sauvignon Merlot Wine Making Ingredient Kit
overall_summary: Premium wine-making kit positioned as an ultra-premium product. Features a sophisticated blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot with a focus on high-quality ingredients and a refined flavor profile. The packaging and branding emphasize luxury and craftsmanship, targeting adult consumers seeking a rich, full-bodied wine experience. The absence of alcohol in the kit suggests it is designed for home winemaking enthusiasts rather than immediate consumption.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Tom Sturgis Little Ones Pretzels 24 oz. Bag (3 Bags)
Bullet Point 1: Tom Sturgis Little Ones Pretzels in a Large 24 oz. Bag
Bullet Point 2: Available in orders of 2, 3, or 4 Bags
Bullet Point 3: Since 1861 America's first pretzel baking family.
Bullet Point 4: Made with all natural ingredients. There are zero grams trans fat.
Product Description: Almost 150 years doing the same thing, we can hardly believe it, can you? Tom Sturgis (baking for six decades), is still improving the pretzel. Tom's father, Marriott (Tom Sr.), learned to bake artisan pretzels in the early 1900's. But you have to go back to 1861 when my great, great grandfather, Julius Sturgis, first baked pretzels to get to the origin of pretzel baking in America... almost 150 years ago. Today we have fourth, fifth, and sixth generations working together to bring you a wonderful taste of baking history. Sincerely, Bruce T. Sturgis
Value: 72.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Family-owned brand with a long history, offering a budget-friendly snack option. The product is marketed as natural with zero trans fat, but lacks premium or specialty certifications. The bundle deal of three 24 oz bags provides good value for bulk purchases.
